name: longformer
description: Longformer — a portable UI kit for building AI UI OS style workspaces (Chat, Notes, Email, Generated in-line UI).

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=longformer-ui && npm run build --workspace=longformer-demo
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=longformer-ui && npm run typecheck --workspace=longformer-demo
